text:
{
  "english": {
    "IsA": [
      "It is a science fiction board wargame."
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "It has 17\" x 22\" map.",
      "It has counters for missiles, fighters, bombers, tankers, engineers and damage.",
      "It has a 20-page rulebook.",
      "It has two Strategic Displays."
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "It is characterized by American and Soviet miners in the asteroid belt.",
      "It is characterized by a nuclear war for dominance.",
      "It is characterized by spacecraft and missiles being launched.",
      "It is characterized by simultaneous revelation of missile targets.",
      "It is characterized by spacecraft engaging in combat.",
      "It is characterized by spacecraft landing to re-arm, refuel and be repaired.",
      "It is characterized by engineers being deployed to repair their asteroid.",
      "It is characterized by static defenses including missiles and lasers.",
      "It is characterized by the need for massed attacks to saturate defenses.",
      "It is characterized by bookkeeping."
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "It is used for playing a board wargame.",
      "It is used for simulating a nuclear war for dominance.",
      "It is used for engaging spacecraft in combat.",
      "It is used for repairing asteroids.",
      "It is used for blasting mining operations on the opposing asteroid.",
      "It is used for keeping one's own asteroid from being blasted."
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [
      "It is located in the asteroid belt."
    ],
    "BuiltIn": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "BuiltBy": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "OriginatedIn": [
      "It originated in 1979."
    ],
    "FoundedBy": [

    ],

    "CreatedBy": [
      "It was created by Stephen V. Cole."

    "CreatedIn": [

      "It was developed by Task Force Games."
    ],

      "It was invented by Stephen V. Cole."

      "unknown"

      "It was manufactured by Task Force Games."
    ],
    "ProducedBy": [
      "It was produced by Task Force Games."
    ],
    "CausedBy": [
      "It is caused by solar flares cutting off contact with Earth."
    ],
    "Affects": [
      "It affects American and Soviet miners."
    ],
    "ConsistsOf": [
      "It consists of counters for missiles, fighters, bombers, tankers, engineers and damage.",
      "It consists of a 20-page rulebook.",
      "It consists of two Strategic Displays."
    ],

      "It is part of a series of microgames."
    ],
    "MemberOf": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "BelongsTo": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "KnownFor": [
      "It is known for its storyline continuing in a sequel."
    ],
    "AssociatedWith": [
      "It is associated with Stephen V. Cole.",
      "It is associated with Task Force Games.",
      "It is associated with Alvin Belflower.",
      "It is associated with Allen D. Eldridge.",
      "It is associated with Starfire.",
      "It is associated with Cerberus.",
      "It is associated with Dragon magazine.",
      "It is associated with Ares Magazine.",
      "It is associated with The Space Gamer.",
      "It is associated with Fantastic magazine.",
      "It is associated with White Dwarf magazine.",
      "It is associated with Phoenix magazine.",
      "It is associated with Simulacrum magazine."
    ],
    "NamedAfter": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "OccurredIn": [
      "It occurred in the asteroid belt."
    ],
    "HeldIn": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "WonBy": [
      "It was won by the player with the asteroid still best able to function as a mine."
    ],
    "About": [
      "It is about American and Soviet miners in the asteroid belt.",
      "It is about a nuclear war for dominance.",
      "It is about spacecraft combat.",
      "It is about repairing asteroids.",
      "It is about blasting mining operations."
    ],
    "InfluencedBy": [
      "It was influenced by the premise of rationalizing carrier systems for space combat."
    ],
    "Influenced": [
      "It influenced the design of a sequel, Cerberus.",
      "It influenced the development of a computer version."
    ]

  "japanese": {
    "IsA": [
      "それはSFボードウォーゲームです。"
    ],
    "HasA": [
      "それは17\" x 22\"のマップを持っています。",
      "それはミサイル、戦闘機、爆撃機、タンカー、エンジニア、ダメージ用のカウンターを持っています。",
      "それは20ページのルールブックを持っています。",
      "それは2つの戦略ディスプレイを持っています。"
    ],
    "HasFeatureOf": [
      "それは小惑星帯のアメリカとソ連の鉱夫によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは支配をめぐる核戦争によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは宇宙船とミサイルの発射によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それはミサイルターゲットの同時開示によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは宇宙船の戦闘への参加によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは宇宙船の再武装、燃料補給、修理のための着陸によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それはエンジニアの小惑星修理のための展開によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それはミサイルとレーザーを含む静的防衛によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは防衛を飽和させるための集団攻撃の必要性によって特徴づけられます。",
      "それは帳簿管理によって特徴づけられます。"
    ],
    "UsedFor": [
      "それはボードウォーゲームをプレイするために使用されます。",
      "それは支配をめぐる核戦争をシミュレートするために使用されます。",
      "それは宇宙船の戦闘に従事するために使用されます。",
      "それは小惑星を修理するために使用されます。",
      "それは相手の小惑星の採掘作業を爆破するために使用されます。",
      "それは自分の小惑星が爆破されるのを防ぐために使用されます。"
    ],
    "LocatedIn": [
      "それは小惑星帯にあります。"
    ],
    "BuiltIn": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "BuiltBy": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "OriginatedIn": [
      "それは1979年に始まりました。"
    ],
    "FoundedBy": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "FoundedIn": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "CreatedBy": [
      "それはスティーブン・V・コールによって作成されました。"
    ],
    "CreatedIn": [
      "それは1979年に作成されました。"
    ],
    "DevelopedBy": [
      "それはタスクフォースゲームズによって開発されました。"
    ],
    "DevelopedIn": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "DiscoveredBy": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "DiscoveredIn": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "InventedBy": [
      "それはスティーブン・V・コールによって発明されました。"
    ],
    "InventedIn": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "PublishedIn": [
      "それは1979年に出版されました。"
    ],
    "WrittenBy": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "ComposedBy": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "DirectedBy": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "PerformedBy": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "ManufacturedBy": [
      "それはタスクフォースゲームズによって製造されました。"
    ],
    "ProducedBy": [
      "それはタスクフォースゲームズによって制作されました。"
    ],
    "CausedBy": [
      "それは太陽フレアが地球との接触を遮断したことによって引き起こされます。"
    ],
    "Affects": [
      "それはアメリカとソ連の鉱夫に影響を与えます。"
    ],
    "ConsistsOf": [
      "それはミサイル、戦闘機、爆撃機、タンカー、エンジニア、ダメージ用のカウンターで構成されています。",
      "それは20ページのルールブックで構成されています。",
      "それは2つの戦略ディスプレイで構成されています。"
    ],
    "PartOf": [
      "それは一連のマイクロゲームの一部です。"
    ],
    "MemberOf": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "BelongsTo": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "KnownFor": [
      "それは続編でストーリーラインが続くことで知られています。"
    ],
    "AssociatedWith": [
      "それはスティーブン・V・コールと関連があります。",
      "それはタスクフォースゲームズと関連があります。",
      "それはアルヴィン・ベルフラワーと関連があります。",
      "それはアレン・D・エルドリッジと関連があります。",
      "それはスターファイアと関連があります。",
      "それはケルベロスと関連があります。",
      "それはドラゴンマガジンと関連があります。",
      "それはアレスマガジンと関連があります。",
      "それはスペースゲーマーと関連があります。",
      "それはファンタスティックマガジンと関連があります。",
      "それはホワイトドワーフマガジンと関連があります。",
      "それはフェニックスマガジンと関連があります。",
      "それはシミュラクラムマガジンと関連があります。"
    ],
    "NamedAfter": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "OccurredIn": [
      "それは小惑星帯で発生しました。"
    ],
    "HeldIn": [
      "unknown"
    ],
    "WonBy": [
      "それは鉱山として機能し続けるのに最も適した小惑星を持っていたプレイヤーによって勝ち取られました。"
    ],
    "About": [
      "それは小惑星帯のアメリカとソ連の鉱夫についてです。",
      "それは支配をめぐる核戦争についてです。",
      "それは宇宙船の戦闘についてです。",
      "それは小惑星の修理についてです。",
      "それは採掘作業の爆破についてです。"
    ],
    "InfluencedBy": [
      "それは宇宙戦闘のためのキャリアシステムの合理化するという前提の影響を受けました。"
    ],
    "Influenced": [
      "それは続編ケルベロスに影響を与えました。",
      "それはコンピュータ版の開発に影響を与えました。"
    ]
  }
}

IsA: It is a science fiction board wargame.
HasA: It has counters for missiles, fighters, bombers, tankers, engineers and damage.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by American and Soviet miners in the asteroid belt.
It is characterized by a nuclear war for dominance.
It is characterized by spacecraft and missiles being launched.
It is characterized by simultaneous revelation of missile targets.
It is characterized by spacecraft engaging in combat.
It is characterized by spacecraft landing to re-arm, refuel and be repaired.
It is characterized by engineers being deployed to repair their asteroid.
It is characterized by static defenses including missiles and lasers.
It is characterized by the need for massed attacks to saturate defenses.
It is characterized by bookkeeping.
UsedFor: It is used for playing a board wargame.
It is used for simulating a nuclear war for dominance.
It is used for engaging spacecraft in combat.
It is used for repairing asteroids.
It is used for blasting mining operations on the opposing asteroid.
It is used for keeping one's own asteroid from being blasted.
LocatedIn: It is located in the asteroid belt.
CreatedBy: It was created by Stephen V. Cole.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by Task Force Games.
InventedBy: It was invented by Stephen V. Cole.
ManufacturedBy: It was manufactured by Task Force Games.
ProducedBy: It was produced by Task Force Games.
CausedBy: It is caused by solar flares cutting off contact with Earth.
Affects: It affects American and Soviet miners.
ConsistsOf: It consists of counters for missiles, fighters, bombers, tankers, engineers and damage.
It consists of two Strategic Displays.
PartOf: It is part of a series of microgames.
KnownFor: It is known for its storyline continuing in a sequel.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Stephen V. Cole.
It is associated with Task Force Games.
It is associated with Alvin Belflower.
It is associated with Allen D. Eldridge.
It is associated with Starfire.
It is associated with Cerberus.
It is associated with Dragon magazine.
It is associated with Ares Magazine.
It is associated with The Space Gamer.
It is associated with Fantastic magazine.
It is associated with White Dwarf magazine.
It is associated with Phoenix magazine.
It is associated with Simulacrum magazine.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the asteroid belt.
WonBy: It was won by the player with the asteroid still best able to function as a mine.
About: It is about American and Soviet miners in the asteroid belt.
It is about a nuclear war for dominance.
It is about blasting mining operations.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by the premise of rationalizing carrier systems for space combat.
Influenced: It influenced the design of a sequel, Cerberus.
It influenced the development of a computer version.
